atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports left shoulder pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports left shoulder pain that began approximately one week ago.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the pain following a gymnastics class incident.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the pain during a maneuver.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the pain during a fall.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies taking any pain medications.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient previously tried a Tylenol for two or three days without relief.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient describes pain with any movement of the left shoulder.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports pain with elevation of the left shoulder.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports pain with rotation of the left shoulder.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports a history of left arm surgery.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient believes this is unrelated to the current pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical examination reveals limited range of motion in the left shoulder.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical examination reveals pain on active abduction and impingement testing.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Clinician prescribes ibuprofen 600 mg three times daily for one week

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Clinician instructs patient to rest the left arm for at least three weeks

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Clinician orders a follow-up appointment in three weeks
